name: testcontainers-zig
description: A lightweight Zig library for writing tests with throwaway Docker containers

releases.name: v0.1.0
releases.body:
Initial release.

## What's Changed
* Parse Docker pull stream for embedded errors in imagePull by @Copilot in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/6
* Replace fixed header buffer with dynamic ArrayList in sendHttpRequest by @Copilot in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/4
* Fix RFC 7230 §3.3.3 violation: Transfer-Encoding takes precedence over Content-Length by @Copilot in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/5
* Using unix sockets by @dragosv in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/1
* Add MIT license by @dragosv in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/8
* TestContainers labels by @dragosv in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/7
* GitHub release workflow by @dragosv in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/9

## New Contributors
* @dragosv made their first contribution in https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dragosv/testcontainers-zig/commits/v0.1.0

owner_bio: Passionate Polyglot Developer with a focus on localization and quality
